title: One Song Stars Shine Bright
story: Every September 25, music fans celebrate National One-Hit Wonder Day by cranking up those catchy songs that made artists famous for just one amazing tune! People create playlists of classics like "Ice Ice Baby," "Mambo No. 5," and "Come on Eileen" - songs everyone knows but might not remember who sang them. Radio stations play marathon blocks of these memorable hits, and social media fills with people sharing their favorite one-hit wonders and debating which songs truly count. It's the perfect day to appreciate artists who gave us unforgettable earworms, even if they never topped the charts again!
activity_question: What do people typically create on National One-Hit Wonder Day?
follow_up_question: What one-hit wonder song do you think everyone should know?
